messages.message:
Error: Cannot call impure function during render

`Math.random` is an impure function. Calling an impure function can produce unstable results that update unpredictably when the component happens to re-render. (https://react.dev/reference/rules/components-and-hooks-must-be-pure#components-and-hooks-must-be-idempotent).

  614 |     // Build local KOT entry for immediate UI feedback
  615 |     const newKOT = {
> 616 |       id: Math.floor(1000 + Math.random() * 9000).toString(),
      |                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ Cannot call impure function
  617 |       time: new Date().toISOString(),
  618 |       items: currentSessionItems.map(i => ({ ...i, s: 'KOT Sent' })),
  619 |       status: 'Incoming',

Error: Cannot call impure function during render

`Date.now` is an impure function. Calling an impure function can produce unstable results that update unpredictably when the component happens to re-render. (https://react.dev/reference/rules/components-and-hooks-must-be-pure#components-and-hooks-must-be-idempotent).

  618 |       items: currentSessionItems.map(i => ({ ...i, s: 'KOT Sent' })),
  619 |       status: 'Incoming',
> 620 |       createdAt: Date.now(),
      |                  ^^^^^^^^^^ Cannot call impure function
  621 |       itemsReady: 0
  622 |     };
  623 |     const newTotalBill = calculateSessionBill(activeTable, currentSessionItems).subtotal;
